items.title: Galaxy expands retail platform with SOL staking, targeting 6.5% yield
items.whyYouShouldCare: Galaxy's introduction of SOL staking with a 6.5% yield enhances liquidity options and could attract more users to the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Interactive Brokers launches crypto trading in EEA, including BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP
items.whyYouShouldCare: Interactive Brokers' crypto trading expansion into the EEA, including SOL, increases accessibility and could drive higher trading volumes in the Solana market.

items.title: Bitcoin, Crypto Stocks Climb on Reports That Iran's President Is 'Ready to End War'
items.whyYouShouldCare: Positive geopolitical developments may boost overall crypto market sentiment, potentially benefiting SOL's price and adoption as investor confidence rises.
